PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC, DAVID TRAVERSO, DAVID TRAVERSO's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

Petitioners Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC, David Traverso and Daniel Traverso's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.
